query: SpaceX Starship launch schedule upcoming flights May June 2026
answer: The research is complete. I gathered comprehensive data from Wikipedia's Starship articles, covering the full 2026 launch schedule, recent flight history, and vehicle specifications. The key finding is that **Flight 12 is scheduled for May 12, 2026** as the inaugural Block 3 Starship flight from the new OLP-2 pad, with 3 additional flights planned for later in 2026 (Flight 13 + two NASA propellant transfer demo flights).

sources.title: List of Starship launches - Wikipedia
sources.snippet: Comprehensive list of all Starship launches including 2026 planned flights. Flight 12 scheduled May 12, 2026 22:30 UTC with Block 3 B19/S39 from OLP-2.

sources.title: SpaceX Starship - Wikipedia
sources.snippet: As of October 13, 2025, Starship has launched 11 times, with 6 successful flights and 5 failures. Block 3 payload capacity ~100 t to LEO.

sources.title: Starship flight test 11 - Wikipedia
sources.snippet: Flight 11 (Oct 13, 2025) was the last Block 2 flight. All timeline events marked as Success. Controlled splashdown in Indian Ocean.

sources.title: Starship flight test 10 - Wikipedia
sources.snippet: Flight 10 (Aug 26, 2025) used B16 and S37. Successfully completed most objectives despite partial failure on atmospheric reentry. Ship 36 destroyed during pre-flight testing.

sources.title: Starship Propellant Transfer Demonstration - Wikipedia
sources.snippet: Propellant transfer demo expected NET 2026. Two launches: target (depot prototype) then chaser (tanker prototype) 3-4 weeks later.

sources.title: Starship Flight 12 - Next Spaceflight
sources.snippet: Flight 12 scheduled May 12, 2026 from Starbase OLP-2.

sources.title: SpaceX spending on Starship tops $15 billion in rush for airline-like rocketry
sources.snippet: SpaceX spending on Starship has surpassed $15 billion.

sources.title: Elon Musk on X - Ship catch strategy
sources.snippet: Should note that SpaceX will only try to catch the ship with the tower after two perfect soft landings in the ocean.

key_facts: Flight 12 is scheduled for May 12, 2026 at 22:30 UTC from Starbase OLP-2, using Block 3 Booster 19 and Ship 39 — the first Block 3 Starship flight
Flight 12 was originally planned with Booster 18, which was severely damaged during proof testing in November 2025 and scrapped
Flight 11 (Oct 13, 2025) was the most recent and last Block 2 flight, a success with controlled splashdown in the Indian Ocean
As of October 13, 2025, Starship has launched 11 times total with 6 successes and 5 failures
Flight 13 is planned for 2026 with no specific date; it will follow a similar profile to Flight 12 with a soft ocean ship landing
Elon Musk stated (Feb 27, 2026) SpaceX will only attempt to catch the ship with the tower after two perfect soft ocean landings
Two additional 2026 flights planned: NASA Propellant Transfer Demo (target and chaser vehicles, 3-4 weeks apart)
Block 3 Starship has ~100 metric ton payload capacity to LEO, up from ~35 t (Block 2) and ~15 t (Block 1)
SpaceX spending on Starship has topped $15 billion as of May 2026
All four first Block 2 upper stages (Flights 7-10) experienced failures or partial failures in 2025
Artemis III docking test scheduled for 2027; crewed lunar landing for 2028
SpaceX delayed Mars plans to focus on 2027 moon landing (Reuters, Feb 6, 2026)
2026 has 4 planned Starship flights total; 7 more planned for 2027
OLP-2 (Orbital Launch Pad 2) at Starbase will be used for the first time with Flight 12
